_note: myth-vol01-en.json 교차검증 확정 수정 (Opus Tier-3 판정). id=글로벌 문장순번.

fixes.new: Maybe the conservation went wrong? Like the paint peeled off.
It's almost as if the painting is disappearing on its own…
The same stars are disappearing. I'm serious.
Wh-who's there? I know you're in there.
Aaaah?! A-a quill… is talking?
To be more precise, I'm a fragment of the Theogony, written by the poet Hesiod himself.
Yes, that very book. By the look on your face, it seems you've heard the name before.
You showed up late again. How long did you wander around this time?
…And who is this little one now? There's a rainbow shimmering over their head.
We have to travel all the way back to the beginning of mythology — before it's forgotten.
I'll lay out the rainbow road. Keep your footing firm, all the way down to your toes!
It might be dizzying at first, but don't close your eyes! If you let go of my hand, we're in big trouble.
The rainbow road is a bridge connecting light and darkness.
Whoaaa… is this really the road to the world of myths?
We're here. Keep your footsteps quiet too, Hara.
Wh-where… are we?
Now, what you're about to see… is the first page of mythology.
The very first to awaken was Mother Gaia.
Wow, it's so warm! My heart is racing!
Hello! I'll bring the morning to you every day!
Wow! They're siblings, just like us!
Now then, let us make the universe.
The family of the first gods — the oldest beginning of all mythology.
…I… from the deep… am here with you.
It's their first meeting as mother and son… so warm.
Yes. The great framework of the world was shaped by one person's hands.
This moment, when Earth and Sky meet, is the first bond that opens the age of the gods.
Oooh~ Smells like foreshadowing~
See that? They can lift a whole mountain as if it were a cotton ball.
They're known as the strongest giant brothers in all of mythology.
The mountains, the sea, the thunder, and the hundred-handed ones — every one of them is beautiful.
They must all grow up safe and free.
The moment pride turns into fear — the first conflict in mythology begins.
That single eye, those hundred hands… they're far too strong.
What if a child I made takes my place?
Pen! The look in his eyes has changed!
Pen, the look in Uranus's eyes… has turned cold.
I will surely come back for you. I promise.
Will Father… send us there too?
Pen, the youngest is trembling the most, yet his gaze is steady.
Mountains, seas, and fields — please weep with me too.
This sickle is a hard, radiant light that grew deep within the earth.
A solid metal took in Gaia's sorrow and turned into light.
My children, will any of you help your mother?
I have to guard the path of light.
The youngest… his hands are trembling, but his gaze is steady.
That night, the first hero in mythology stood holding the golden sickle.
I'll bring the light back to the depths once more.
Pen… the youngest's back looks bigger and bigger now.
This is the hard metal I nurtured deep within myself.
It's not a weapon to swing, but a token for engraving a promise.
Our part is just to watch from the side, to the very end.
…I understand, Pen. I'll watch until the end.
It's the key to freedom for your trapped brothers.
That once you've freed your brothers, you must never lock them away again.
…I won't lock them away again.
Say it clearly, one more time.
Within that light, the first promise was engraved between the mother and her youngest son.
Even those who hung back in fear watched the youngest one's retreating back.
Cronus, we'll walk that road alongside you.
Even if we can't carry the light, we'll bear the shadows.
Wow, one more star must have risen in Gimje's night sky too!
The book is calling us. Quick, let's step onto the path.
Lady Gaia, I'll come back again. I promise!
Goodbye to the sleeping giants too! When you wake, tell us your story.
We're back. It's really the same cave we left.
Hwanin fathered Hwanung, and Hwanung fathered Dangun. That's the first story of our Korean peninsula.
In Greece, Chaos gave birth to Gaia, Gaia to Uranus, and Uranus to the twelve Titans.
